mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate reduces the discount rate applied to future corporate earnings, directly boosting equity valuations over the subsequent month.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: When the unemployment rate drops below 8.0%, labor market slack dissipates, triggering wage growth expectations that improve corporate profit margins and drive positive equity returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20-day returns in fewer than 40% of instances when UNRATE crosses below 8.0%, or predictive R-squared drops below 0.01 over a 3-year out-of-sample test.

mechanism_narrative: Strong housing starts combined with rising industrial production indicate synchronized demand and supply recovery, reducing recession risk premiums and lifting equity valuations within a month.
failure_condition: The joint HOUST-INDPRO signal yields a negative or zero predictive rank IC across any 3-year out-of-sample rolling window, or forward returns show no statistical edge over a random baseline.

mechanism_narrative: In a tightening regime, accelerating headline inflation forces the Federal Reserve to hike rates faster than priced in, compressing equity multiples and generating negative short-term returns.
failure_condition: Equity returns remain positive in more than 50% of triggered instances, or the signal fails to outperform a buy-and-hold benchmark on a risk-adjusted basis over a 5-year period.

mechanism_narrative: Rising real personal consumption expenditures reflect expanding aggregate demand, which directly increases corporate revenue growth and supports positive equity returns over a quarterly horizon.
failure_condition: Quarterly forward returns show no correlation with RSAFS momentum, or the predictive R-squared remains below 0.01 across any 2-year rolling estimation window.

mechanism_narrative: Accelerating industrial production signals capacity utilization recovery and deflationary supply expansion, which lowers input costs and boosts equity profit margins over the next month.
failure_condition: The signal fails to predict positive returns when INDPRO accelerates, or produces a negative rank IC over a 5-year rolling window despite clear supply expansion.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous declines in unemployment and growth in real consumption expenditures confirm a self-reinforcing recovery loop, eliminating recession fears and driving sustained equity outperformance over a quarter.
failure_condition: The joint indicator yields a Sharpe ratio below 0.2 or a positive IC in more than 40% of out-of-sample periods, indicating no persistent predictive power.

mechanism_narrative: In a liquidity-constrained regime, subpar GDP growth triggers flight-to-quality dynamics and risk-off positioning, causing immediate negative equity returns over the following week.
failure_condition: Equity returns remain positive or neutral when GDP growth falls below 1.5%, or the signal's predictive power vanishes after controlling for VIX levels in a multivariate regression.
